title: aleuritia rosea
intro: Aleuritia rosea, also known as the Aleurites or Candlenut, is a tropical tree native to the Pacific Islands, producing a seed that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The Aleurites seed contains oils with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Aleurites seed oil include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. Aleurites seed oil can be prepared as an herbal remedy through cold-pressing the seeds to extract the oil, or by infusing the seeds in a carrier oil for topical application.
